hero.title: Count Tokens.
hero.subtitle: Paste text or upload a file — get an instant token count and cost estimate across all major LLM providers.

analyzer.title: Token Analyzer
analyzer.subtitle: Instant token count & cost estimate
analyzer.placeholder: Paste your prompt, document, or any text here…
analyzer.upload_title: Drop file here or click to browse
analyzer.upload_hint: Supports TXT, MD, PDF, DOCX, code files · Max 10 MB
analyzer.optimize_subtitle: Reduce token usage without losing meaning

features.title: Built for developers who care about costs
features.f1_desc: Official tokenizers where available (tiktoken, Claude). Clearly labeled estimates for all others.
features.f2_desc: Compare costs across OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Cohere, Google and more in one view.
features.f3_desc: Analyze TXT, MD, PDF, DOCX and code files. Up to 10 MB. No data stored.
features.f4_desc: Estimate retrieval costs, chunk sizes, and embedding token budgets for your RAG pipelines.
features.f5_desc: Get actionable tips to reduce token count while preserving the meaning of your prompts.
features.f6_desc: Text is processed in memory only. Nothing is logged, stored, or shared with third parties.

models.title: All major providers, one tool
models.subtitle: Token counts and pricing for every model that matters
models.note: Prices sourced from official provider APIs. Updated regularly.

pricing.title: Start free, scale when ready
pricing.subtitle: No credit card required for the free tier.
pricing.coming_soon_note: Upgrades coming soon — currently free for everyone.

cta.title: Start counting tokens for free
cta.subtitle: No account required. Paste text and get results instantly.

footer.tagline: The token intelligence platform for LLM developers.
footer.disclaimer: Token counts marked "Est." are approximations. Exact counts use official tokenizers.

chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Tokenia's assistant. Ask me anything about token counting, costs, or how to get started.
chat.fallback: I don't have an answer for that yet. You can reach us at info@tokenia.live and we'll get back to you shortly.
chat.form_success: Message sent! We'll reply within 24 hours.
chat.form_error: Could not send. Please email info@tokenia.live directly.
